name: letsbook-docs-header-animation
description: Remotion project for the docs hero header animation

scripts.encode-web: ffmpeg -y -i out/bubble-header.raw.mp4 -c:v libx264 -tune animation -crf 17 -preset slow -pix_fmt yuv420p -x264-params deblock=2,2 -movflags +faststart -an out/bubble-header.mp4
scripts.render: npm run render-raw && npm run encode-web
scripts.encode-small-web: ffmpeg -y -i out/bubble-header-small.raw.mp4 -c:v libx264 -tune animation -crf 17 -preset slow -pix_fmt yuv420p -x264-params deblock=2,2 -movflags +faststart -an out/bubble-header-small.mp4
scripts.render-small: npm run render-small-raw && npm run encode-small-web
